title: pyrus eminentiformis
intro: Pyrus eminentiformis, also known as the Korean mountain apple or Korean white pear, is a species of deciduous tree in the rose family native to Korea. The medicinal properties of Pyrus eminentiformis include its ability to treat fever, cough, and sore throats due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Pyrus eminentiformis include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and aid in digestion. Pyrus eminentiformis can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or decoction, and its fruit can be eaten raw or used in jams, jellies, and other culinary preparations.
